summary: Test changes for Task 01 are correct and meaningful. The 5 flipped per-view NotRecordable assertions and the two updated PG14 rows in Test_filterViews both couple directly to the implementation change (removing NotRecordable: true) and act as genuine regression guards. Independently verified the new counts: every testcase row satisfies the wantN+wantV=27 invariant (PG14 s="": 9+18, s="public": 3+24; unchanged lower-version rows all sum to 27). The rewritten Test_filterViews comment block is factually coherent with the new counts and the unchanged lower-version rows. Both test groups (TestNew, Test_filterViews, TestFilterViews_dropsExplicitNotRecordable) pass.
